cover.formula: sum of pi*(cr/2)*(cr90/2) over LIVE plants, divided by the surveyed area. Crowns may overlap, so this is summed crown area, not a union.
cover.denominatorBasis: Vegetation Structure mapped only the eastern half of the 40x40 m base plot (x in [0, 20] m of 40). The unsurveyed western half is excluded from the denominator rather than counted as measured zero cover.
cover.note: Counts here are LIVE plants; whole-plant mortality is reported separately.

note: NEON Vegetation Structure (DP1.10098.001), plot SRER_048 — every plant is a real tagged individual at its mapped position, anchored to the true 40×40 m plot centre.

plants.sci: Ephedra trifurca Torr. ex S. Watson
Ephedra trifurca Torr. ex S. Watson

provenance.accessed_basis: first commit of this file (8a330df, 2026-07-19 18:42 UTC); the exact query date was not recorded at build time
provenance.release_basis: built from a live API query rather than a pinned NEON release, so the release vintage was never captured. NEON releases are versioned and revise prior data, so these records cannot be pinned to a release after the fact.
provenance.builder: build_plot.py (scratchpad; not committed - needs raw VST CSVs + an API token)
provenance.campaign_note: This reconstruction pools two survey bouts (2016 and 2021) into one scene. It is a two-bout composite, not a single-date census. The sibling Vegetation Structure Explorer's current contract treats the latest supported event per plot as current state and does not pool repeated events as independent observations.

sibling_current_release.note: The sibling app has since pinned this product to RELEASE-2026 with an exact source digest. This prototype has NOT been rebuilt against it; its records may differ from that release.
